verification_notes: Self-describes as 'largest individually owned life safety company in TX'. Founded 1990 by Billy R. Corbin Jr. Carries ACR/SCR/ECR plus security license. Multi-location across TX (Houston, Dallas, Austin, Corpus Christi, College Station, Victoria) but single ownership.
Family-owned 'Serving Houston since 1945(TM)'. Holds ACR, ECR, HCR (hood) licenses. Strong recurring-revenue mix (kitchen hood + extinguisher + alarm).

legal_name: Wilson Fire Equipment & Service Co., Inc.
verification_notes: Family-owned since 1916; four generations of family leadership. ECR-094 is an extremely old license number (suggests very early TX SFMO registration). Detection/suppression/security + healthcare focus.
Family-owned and operated. Multi-trade: alarms, sprinklers, suppression, extinguishers, pumps, hydrants. Serves greater Houston and surrounding TX metros via service-area landing pages.
Founded 1982. Full multi-trade: alarms, commercial sprinklers, extinguishers, kitchen hood, ultrasonic testing, BDA/ERRC, nurse call, monitoring. ECR-961 indicates long license tenure.
Founded Feb 2002. HQ in Houston with offices in Dallas (Farmers Branch), Austin, and San Antonio. Sprinklers, alarms, extinguishers, pumps + security.

Self-described family-owned. Alarms, extinguishers, 24/7 monitoring, backflow, pumps, emergency lighting. Note: shares 3522 Bolin Rd address with Reliable Fire Protection — may be related entities. Worth investigating in enrichment phase.

Self-described family-owned, Houston-based, NICET-certified specialists. Shares 3522 Bolin Rd address with Spartan Fire Protection — likely sister entity, same physical operation under two brands. Enrichment phase: confirm DBA structure and consolidate if needed.

Family-owned. Serving Houston since 2017. Sprinklers, alarms, extinguishers, fire mains, pumps, backflow. Newer (under 10 yrs), may not meet 'long-tenured' threshold but still worth seeding for enrichment phase.
Serving Houston since 1999. Commercial fire alarms, sprinkler service, extinguishers, kitchen hood inspections, emergency lighting, security.
Greater Houston / Ship Channel focus (Deer Park, Pasadena, La Porte, Baytown). Alarms + monitoring, sprinklers, extinguishers, backflow, kitchen hood, pumps.
Claims 50+ years industry experience (combined). Full multi-trade: alarms, sprinklers, extinguishers, clean agent, kitchen hood. Uses itmtracking.com for inspection reports. Founding year not stated.
Sprinkler-focused, 14+ years in greater Houston (so founded ~2010). Sprinklers for residential, commercial, industrial.
Family-owned full-service sprinkler contractor. 15+ years experience. Sprinkler systems, fire pumps, standpipes, water storage tanks, special hazards.
30+ years in Texas. Sprinkler installation, inspection, maintenance, design, backflow, radio monitoring. Sugar Land (Fort Bend Co); included as Houston-metro adjacent.
25+ years in business. Industrial/commercial/offshore focus. Alarms, sprinklers, suppression, gas detection, design/consulting/engineering, maintenance/monitoring, backflow.
Family-owned, minority-owned HUB. Alarms, inspections, extinguishers, security, surveillance, monitoring, access control. Holds ACR + ECR.
Serving TX since 1990 (35 years). Commercial fire alarm + burglar/intrusion + video + access control + PA/intercom + 24/7 monitoring. ACR-1975 is a low/old number — long license tenure.
Founded 2001. 'A Alif Security Company' — this is a parent/sibling relationship, not a national platform but worth flagging in enrichment phase. Three central monitoring centers. BBB A+ since 2004.
Family-owned. Fire alarm + sprinkler supervisory + security + access + cameras + 24/7 monitoring. Tomball (NW Harris County).
Family-owned, started 2006 as fire alarm monitoring company. Fire alarm monitoring + residential/commercial security.

EXCLUDE — Website explicitly states 'a proud part of Pye-Barker Fire & Safety'. Recorded here for the platform_subsidiary count, NOT a target. Original founding 1987, veteran-owned, but no longer independent.
Oldest fire sprinkler company in TX (since 1933 — 90+ years). Family-implied. Sprinklers, alarms, extinguishers, suppression, backflow, monitoring. DFW + Granbury offices.

Family-owned since 1982. Father-son leadership (Bud + Ben Shipman). Sprinkler systems + alarms + 24/7 monitoring + value engineering + fabrication. Multi-metro service (DFW, Houston, Austin, San Antonio).

Locally owned by 'Fire Protection Professionals' since 1970 (55+ years). SCR-G-0005 is one of the earliest TX sprinkler licenses ever issued — very long tenure signal. Sprinklers, alarms, extinguishers, clean agent, kitchen hood. Multi-city (San Angelo, Dallas, San Antonio, Houston).
Alarms (Gamewell-FCI / Honeywell), sprinklers, extinguishers (portable + fixed), kitchen suppression. NICET-certified design dept; TDI SFMO licensed technicians.
Founded 2010. Fire alarm + sprinkler installation/inspection/service. Multiple TX locations (Garland HQ, Frisco, Spring, Houston). Kidde-affiliated brand displayed but no acquisition language.
Locally owned. DSS Fireguard servicing the metroplex since 1979, joined DSS Fire family in 2009. Fire alarm new construction/retrofit, emergency 24/7 service, monitoring, mass notification, security.
TX SFMO licensed. Fire extinguishers + kitchen suppression + emergency exit lighting. Service-area driven (smaller route business).

license_holder_name: Thomas (retired Dallas FD, founder) and Elaine (co-founder)
verification_notes: Family-owned since 1978. Founded by Thomas (31-yr Dallas FD veteran) and Elaine (RN Parkland). Fire extinguishers — sales, refills, installs, inspections + automatic fire suppression systems.
Founded 1993. Brantley family referenced as 'Fire Safety experts'. Fire extinguisher inspection/cert/maintenance/recharge/training + extinguisher sales. Travels throughout North TX.

Family-owned since 1990 (35 yrs). Fire extinguisher inspection/test/service/refill, monthly/yearly/6-yr servicing, training, emergency exit/light testing. Amerex Trusted Provider. Note: Rowlett borders Dallas/Rockwall counties — primary BBB listing is Dallas Co metro.
Certified Women-Owned Business. Fire extinguisher maintenance (DC, CO2, clean agent, Class K, water) + hydro-testing + CO2 refills + commercial dry ice + oxygen cylinders.

60+ years in business in DFW. Family-owned 42 yrs by Pitts family, then sold to current owner's father (kept name + family ownership tradition). Fire extinguisher sales/service/install/inspection. NOTE: HQ in Frisco = Collin County, NOT Dallas/Tarrant — included as Dallas metro adjacent.
25 yrs in business / 60+ yrs combined experience. Locally owned + operated. Sprinklers, alarms, extinguishers. Holds licenses in 15+ states. SCR-0383 + ECR-1366 are old/low numbers = long tenure.
Founded 2016 (under 10 yrs — newer). Women-owned. Alarms, sprinklers, extinguisher maintenance, 24/7 monitoring, kitchen hood installs, backflow, fire pump service. 30+ yrs of combined leadership.

Founded 1998 by Shannon Payne and John Hubbard. Sprinklers, alarm/detection, suppression, extinguishers, ITM, 24/7 monitoring. Multi-state. Enrichment phase: confirm ownership status — 25 yrs old with multi-state presence raises platform risk.
Family-run since 2004. Fire protection services from small service calls to complete installs. DFW metroplex.

Family-owned since 1993. Fire alarm, extinguisher, sprinkler install/maintenance. ACR-1751 / SCR-0319 / ECR-1751372 — old numbers, long tenure. Member NFPA + FSCATX. NOTE: HQ Rockwall County (DFW metro adjacent). Houston office at 8556 Katy Fwy. Included as Dallas-metro candidate.
20+ years experience. Fire sprinkler design/install/inspection/service. Residential + commercial.
35+ yrs combined experience. Sprinkler install/repair/maintenance/inspection/design + fire alarm monitoring + backflow + 24/7 emergency. NOTE: Rowlett borders Dallas/Rockwall.
'Full Service Fire Protection Contractor Since 1988' (37 yrs). Fire suppression (kitchen + paint spray booth) + extinguishers + alarms + monitoring. Holds ACR + ECR + HCR (hood).

Family-owned. References '56 years of experience' and 'over 51 years' of service (late 1960s/early 1970s founding). Vent-A-Hood suppression + fire alarms + safety inspections. Serves DFW including Mansfield, Arlington, DeSoto, Plano. NOTE: HQ Waxahachie (Ellis County) — included as DFW-metro adjacent.
Founded 1992 (33 yrs). Commercial sprinkler install/renovation + backflow + annual + 5-yr inspections + 24/7 emergency. NICET-certified technicians. Richland Hills = Tarrant County (NE Fort Worth).

Family-owned. Sprinklers, alarms, extinguishers, pumps, backflow + design/consulting. Serves Fort Worth, Dallas, Arlington. NOTE: HQ in Parker County (Weatherford — west of FW); included as Tarrant-metro candidate.

Family-owned. Self-describes as 'brand new' — recent founding. Fire extinguishers + fire alarms + restaurant suppression + monitoring. Serves Parker, Hood, Tarrant, Palo Pinto counties. NOTE: low tenure — flag for enrichment phase.

20+ years. Licensed systems integration contractor. Fire sprinkler, fire alarm, security, nurse call, special hazard, monitoring, structured cabling. Multi-state (AZ, CO, TX, FL, WA, OH, IN, AL) — could be a regional roll-up but no parent disclosed. Enrichment phase: verify ownership structure.

license_holder_name: Ron Skelton Jr. (current owner; took over from Ron Skelton Sr. + Jeanne in 2010)
verification_notes: Family-owned since 1983 (43 yrs). Ron Skelton Sr. + Jeanne started; Ron Jr. (+ Jennifer) bought it in 2010 — second-generation succession already complete. Alarms (Honeywell Farenhyt/Gamewell-FCI) + sprinklers + suppression + extinguishers + 24/7 monitoring. BBB accredited since 2014.

Founded Dec 1983 (42 yrs). SCR-G-0008 — one of the lowest/oldest TX sprinkler license numbers (extremely long tenure). 30,000 sqft HQ with in-house pipe fabrication (rare). Sprinkler install/maintenance/inspection/backflow/24-hr emergency. Helotes = NW Bexar County (San Antonio metro).

Family-owned + managed since 1986 (39 yrs). Fire extinguisher annual inspections + sales/service + first aid + pre-engineered suppression systems + safety training. Classic route-based recurring revenue model.

25+ yrs fire protection experience (combined). Sprinklers + alarms + extinguisher + kitchen suppression + emergency exit lights + safety inspections. Schertz = on Bexar/Guadalupe County line (San Antonio metro NE). Founding year not stated.

Family-owned, founded 2014 (~11 yrs). Multi-trade: sprinkler design/install/maintenance, alarms + 24-hr central monitoring, extinguishers, clean agent suppression, cooking protection (UL-300), fire mains/hydrants, ITM. Both Austin (512) and SA (210-200-8407) ops.

Privately owned since 1998 (27 yrs). Alarm, sprinkler/suppression, voice evacuation, mass notification, security, CCTV, access, UL-listed monitoring. SCR-0484 = old number. Aggies 100 + Inc 5000 (2008-09).

Family-owned with 'nearly 3 generations of experience' in TX. Fire alarm + suppression design/repair/monitoring/install. Direct website fetch timed out — used Blue Book listing as backup source. Enrichment phase: confirm street address + founding year.

legal_name: Alliance Safety and Fire Protection L.P.
verification_notes: Founded 2003 (22 yrs). Alarms, sprinklers, extinguishers, kitchen suppression, backflow, BDA. NOTE: HQ Round Rock (Williamson County — Austin metro N). Included as Travis-adjacent.

Privately owned + operated since 2008 (17 yrs). 100+ yrs combined experience. Alarms, sprinklers, extinguishers, suppression, monitoring, special hazards, marine. NOTE: HQ Round Rock = Williamson County (Austin metro).

Sprinkler-focused multi-trade. Owners describe origins 'as apprentices with local 669 in the mid 2000s' — founding ~2005. Sprinkler design/install/test/maintenance + backflow. Serves Austin/Temple/Waco/SanMarcos/Brenham/MarbleFalls/Killeen. NOTE: HQ Georgetown = Williamson County.
Self-describes as 'licensed and insured, local family owned and operated fire protection business'. Extinguishers, kitchen hood suppression, alarms, sprinklers, backflow, hydrants.

Family-owned since 2006 (19 yrs). Fire extinguisher sales (ABC, CO2, Wet Chemical, Clean Agent, Purple K, Class D, wheeled) + annual inspection/maintenance + recharging + employee safety training. Austin (Travis) HQ + SA office. Classic route business.

Largest distributor of AUTOCALL technology in TX. Alarms, sprinklers, special hazards, security/video, access control, nurse call, mass notification, first responder radio. Serves SA, Austin, DFW, Houston, NM. NOTE: HQ Comal County (between San Antonio + Austin) — included as SA-metro adjacent.

Family-owned, certified woman-owned business. Founded 1993 (32 yrs) by James + Ruby Brown. Sprinklers + alarms + extinguishers (install/inspect/monitor). Waxahachie (Ellis Co) + Woodway (Waco) — included as DFW-metro adjacent.

Multi-trade. Sprinklers + alarms + kitchen hood suppression + backflow + paint booth + emergency lighting + extinguishers + suppression + detection + consulting/training. Cypress/Woodlands/SugarLand/Katy.
